qa_pairs.question: Which staff member has the first name Junius and the last name Treutel?

SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
WHERE staff.staff_first_name = 'Junius' AND staff.staff_last_name = 'Treutel'

WHERE problem_log.other_log_details = 'c'
